eas_text: A civil authority has issued A LOCAL AREA EMERGENCY for the following counties or areas: Kendall, TX; at 6:01 PM on JUL 16, 2026 Effective until 6:31 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: CROSSING AND WATER STONE NEIGHBORHOODS Eastern Kendall County. RIVER RISING. Be alert and seek higher ground. Emergency Crews working in the area .B. Constantine-  Kendall County OEM
